name: Adramelech
author: FallingStar

placementContext.reason: Adramelech is poised to redefine difficulty standards with its relentless wave sequences and frame-perfect ship maneuvers, creating a level of intensity that rivals and possibly surpasses current top-tier demons.

description: A visually stunning collaboration led by FallingStar, Adramelech features atmospheric decoration paired with some of the most demanding mechanical challenges in the game, making it a highly anticipated contender for the top 1 spot.
